sources.title: Electrochemical impedance test
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M10] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Electrochemical impedance test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 40-43.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M10] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Electrochemical impedance test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 40-43.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the primary reference for SOC-resolved EIS execution.
Use literature for setup discipline and interpretation, not to replace the SOC staircase or frequency range.

sources.title: Thermal characterisation
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M11] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Thermal characterisation," White Paper, 2018, pp. 38-39.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M11] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Thermal characterisation," White Paper, 2018, pp. 38-39.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the reference for pseudo-adiabatic and thermostated-plate thermal mapping.
Keep the two-stage thermal fixture logic explicit even when the exact current profile is tailored.

sources.title: Thermal impedance test
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding
sources.citation_ieee: [M12] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Thermal impedance test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 44-46.
sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M12] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Thermal impedance test," White Paper, 2018, pp. 44-46.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as the primary reference for sinusoidal thermal-impedance measurement and parameter fitting.
Keep the 25 C stabilization and 0.1 to 10 mHz frequency window explicit in any plan.

sources.title: Quasi-static thermal tests
sources.handbook_title: Test methods for improved battery cell understanding

sources.linked_reference_markdown: [M13] G. Mulder, H. Popp, W. Kohs, K. Trad, K. de Craemer, W. Porcher, M. Montaru, M. A. Martinez, A. Marongiu, M. Oyarbide et al., "Test methods for improved battery cell understanding: Quasi-static thermal tests," White Paper, 2018, pp. 47-48.
ingestion_notes: Treat this chapter as a synchronized swelling / dilatometer reference, not as a generic thermal transient method.
Keep the link to the paired capacity-style electrical cycle explicit in any plan.
